name: agent-workflows
description: Reusable task workflows, audits, explanations, goal authoring, code writing, publication, and subagent orchestration.

interface.longDescription: Agent Workflows provides reusable workflows for code and instruction audits, implementation, explanation, Git publication, design and goal brainstorming, review, and sequential subagent batches.
defaultPrompt: Clarify this design and prepare a specification and goal.
Commit and publish the current repository changes.
